examples.text: زَرْتُ مَكَانًا جَمِيلًا وَمُثِيرًا لِلْإِعْجَابِ فِي رِحْلَتِي.
examples.english: I visited a beautiful and stunning place on my trip

examples.text:
أَيُّهَٰذَا الشَّاكِي وَمَا بِكَ دَاءٌ
كُنْ جَمِيلًا تَرَ الْوُجُودَ جَمِيلًا
ʔayyuhāḏā š-šākī wamā bika dāʔun
examples.english:
O! who be this complainant, and what is thine ailment?
Be courteous [thyself! and] thou shall see a beautiful existence.

senses.gloss: a male given name, Jamil or Jameel, feminine equivalent جَمِيلَة (jamīla)
